name: Minimum Cost to Connect Sticks
statement:
You have some sticks with positive integer lengths. You can connect any two sticks together to form a longer stick by paying a cost equal to the sum of their lengths. You must connect all the sticks into one single stick.


Return the minimum cost of connecting all the sticks.

examples.explanation: Connect sticks 2 and 3 → cost = 2 + 3 = 5 (sticks = [5, 4]), Connect sticks 4 and 5 → cost = 4 + 5 = 9 (sticks = [9]), Total cost = 5 + 9 = 14
Connect 1 and 3 → cost = 1 + 3 = 4 (sticks = [4, 8, 5]), Connect 4 and 5 → cost = 4 + 5 = 9 (sticks = [9, 8]), Connect 8 and 9 → cost = 8 + 9 = 17 (sticks = [17]), Total cost = 4 + 9 + 17 = 30
